heading: Step 3: Run the query
body:
- Before running the query, make sure to thoroughly review the
  syntax in the **Filter** bar. Ensure the returned
  query has the fields and operators that match your desired use case.

- Press enter or click the **Find** button to execute
  the query.

The results populate in the documents view.

> **Tip:** 
>
> You can optionally provide feedback by clicking the thumbs up
>  or thumbs down  icon by the
> Natural Language Query Bar and provide details on your experience.
>
> Your feedback **is not** used to train any AI models.
